name: aether
description: Aether — premium multi-game server hosting platform (Minecraft, Icarus & more)

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @aether/panel && npm run build --workspace @aether/daemon
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @aether/shared && npm run test --workspace @aether/daemon
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run db:generate && tsc --noEmit -p apps/panel/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/daemon/tsconfig.json
